description: Controls deterministic record/replay behaviors, and manages replayable recordings and sessions.

types.description: The index and timestamp of an input action.

properties.name: dateCreated
properties.description: Creation time of recording, in milliseconds since the epoch.

properties.name: memorySize
properties.description: Approximate size of in-memory recording representation.

types.description: A replay recording serialized to JSON.

commands.name: startCapture
commands.description: Starts capture of a program execution.

commands.name: stopCapture
commands.description: Stops capture of a program execution.

commands.name: replayUpToMarkIndex
commands.description: Replays the program up to a specific point, called a mark.  command will bring the replay execution up to the point before the first input with the specified mark is used.

commands.name: pausePlayback
commands.description: Pauses the current replay action. Can be resumed by using a replay command.

commands.name: stopPlayback
commands.description: Stops the current playback. Further replaying will start from the beginning. Optionally, unlock user input.

commands.name: setPauseOnError
commands.description: Changes the actions taken by the replay backend when a playback error is encountered.

commands.name: unloadRecording
commands.description: Unloads the currently loaded recording, if any is loaded.

commands.name: getSerializedRecording
commands.description: Returns the recording serialized to a JSON object.

commands.name: getAvailableRecordings
commands.description: Returns uids for all available recordings.

events.name: capturedInput
events.description: A new (event loop) input was captured.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Data for the captured (event loop) input.

events.name: playbackHitMark
events.description: A mark was reached during the replay.

events.name: playbackPaused
events.description: Fired when replaying has paused, but not finished.

parameters.name: mark
parameters.description: The mark of the input at which we paused, but has not yet been executed.

events.name: playbackError
events.description: Fired when playback encounters an internal (divergence) error.

parameters.name: isFatal
parameters.description: Whether the error causes immediate abortion of replay state.

events.name: inputLocked
events.description: Fired when user input has become locked (will be ignored).

events.name: inputUnlocked
events.description: Fired when user input has been unlocked (will no longer be ignored).

events.name: recordingLoaded
events.description: Fired when a recording is loaded.

events.name: recordingUnloaded
events.description: Fired when a recording is unloaded.

events.name: imageCaptured
events.description: Fired when an image of a DOM node is captured.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: A data URI encoding the captured image.

events.name: recordingAdded
events.description: Fired when a new recording is created or found on the filesystem.

events.name: recordingRemoved
events.description: Fired when a recording is removed and can no longer be loaded.
